instruction:
Apply the exact harbor patch: mast stroke width, lighthouse-window color, light-beam position, harbor-wave-long path, and crate-right position are all wrong. Fix only these ids.

Patch:
- crate-right.x: 38 -> 28
- crate-right.y: 80 -> 76
- harbor-wave-long.d: "M82 122 C98 126 112 110 128 122 S158 126 174 122" -> "M82 118 C98 112 112 124 128 118 S158 112 174 118"
- light-beam.points: [[188,26],[140,14],[140,38]] -> [[180,30],[132,18],[132,42]]
- lighthouse-window.fill: "#38bdf8" -> "#fde047"
- mast.stroke-width: 6 -> 3
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f8fbff" />
  <rect id="sky" fill="#dbeafe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" />
  <rect id="water" fill="#38bdf8" x="0" y="70" width="220" height="70" />
  <line id="horizon" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="2" x1="0" y1="70" x2="220" y2="70" />
  <circle id="sun" fill="#fde047" cx="190" cy="22" r="12" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-left" fill="#ffffff" cx="36" cy="26" rx="18" ry="7" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-right" fill="#ffffff" cx="56" cy="25" rx="14" ry="6" />
  <rect id="pier-deck" fill="#92400e" x="0" y="88" width="72" height="10" />
  <path id="rope-coil" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" d="M48 82 C58 72 70 74 70 84 C70 94 54 96 50 88 C46 80 60 78 62 86" />
  <line id="pier-leg-1" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="16" y1="96" x2="13" y2="132" />
  <line id="pier-leg-2" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="56" y1="96" x2="60" y2="132" />
  <polygon id="boat-hull" fill="#be123c" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="84,84 158,84 146,104 96,104" />
  <rect id="boat-cabin" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="106" y="62" width="30" height="20" />
  <rect id="cabin-window" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="114" y="67" width="14" height="8" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="6" x1="126" y1="84" x2="126" y2="26" />
  <polygon id="sail-main" fill="#fef9c3" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="126,30 154,76 126,76" />
  <polygon id="sail-small" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="124,34 100,76 124,76" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#3b82f6" points="126,25 140,29 126,33" />
  <polygon id="lighthouse-body" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="176,82 206,82 200,28 182,28" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-1" fill="#ef4444" x="181" y="48" width="20" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-2" fill="#ef4444" x="179" y="64" width="24" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-cap" fill="#0f172a" x="180" y="22" width="22" height="8" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-window" fill="#38bdf8" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.7" x="188" y="34" width="6" height="8" />
  <polygon id="light-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="188,26 140,14 140,38" />
  <circle id="buoy-red" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="42" cy="112" r="8" />
  <rect id="buoy-red-stripe" fill="#ef4444" x="35" y="110" width="14" height="4" />
  <circle id="buoy-green" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="184" cy="112" r="7" />
  <rect id="buoy-green-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="178" y="110" width="12" height="4" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="6,122 22,118 38,122 54,118 70,122" />
  <path id="harbor-wave-long" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" d="M82 122 C98 126 112 110 128 122 S158 126 174 122" />
  <polyline id="wave-2" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="128,120 146,116 164,120 182,116 200,120" />
  <rect id="crate-left" fill="#a16207" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="12" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <rect id="crate-right" fill="#b45309" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="38" y="80" width="14" height="12" />
  <polygon id="skin-11-beacon-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.58" points="150,48 220,10 220,78" />
  <polyline id="skin-11-bird-wide-a" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.92" points="16,40 28,30 40,40" />
  <polyline id="skin-11-bird-wide-b" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.92" points="54,28 68,18 82,28" />
  <polygon id="identity-11-beam-wide" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="161,32 212,12 212,48" />
  <polyline id="identity-11-gull-a" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.7" points="24,36 30,31 36,36" />
  <polyline id="identity-11-gull-b" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.7" points="48,25 55,20 62,25" />
  <polyline id="identity-11-gull-c" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.7" points="76,41 82,36 88,41" />
  <circle id="variant-11-dot" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.72" cx="53" cy="19" r="3" />
  <line id="variant-11-rule" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.58" x1="59" y1="22" x2="75" y2="20" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-01" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="13" y="6" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-02" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="44" y="4" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-03" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="81" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-04" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="112" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-05" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.68" x="149" y="4" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-06" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="180" y="5" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-07" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="13" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-08" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.68" x="44" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-09" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="81" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-10" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="112" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-11" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="149" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-11-chip-12" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.68" x="180" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-01" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.66" cx="13" cy="23" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-02" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.66" cx="198" cy="37" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-03" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.66" cx="23" cy="51" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-04" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.66" cx="208" cy="65" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-05" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.66" cx="9" cy="79" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-06" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.66" cx="194" cy="93" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-07" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.66" cx="19" cy="107" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-11-pin-08" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.66" cx="204" cy="121" r="2.3" />
</svg>
